newProjectName.title: New Project Name
newProjectName.description: Name for a new Bloomreach project to create. If provided, a new Sandbox project will be created before generating API keys. Leave empty to use an existing project.

sourceProject.title: Source Project (for cloning)
sourceProject.description: Existing project to copy data structure from when creating a new project (default: temp2)

projectSlug.title: Existing Project Slug
projectSlug.description: Use an existing project instead of creating a new one. The project identifier in the URL (e.g. 'temp2'). Only needed if newProjectName is not provided.

cookies.title: Session Cookies
cookies.description: ALL cookies from a logged-in Bloomreach session INCLUDING httpOnly ones. Use the 'Cookie-Editor' browser extension to export.

keyName.title: API Key Name
keyName.description: Name for the new API key (default: forge_run)

email.title: Email (fallback, blocked by CAPTCHA)
email.description: Bloomreach login email. Only needed if NOT using cookies.

password.title: Password (fallback, blocked by CAPTCHA)
password.description: Bloomreach login password. Only needed if NOT using cookies.
